languages.text: Сотни лет пребывания в агрессивной среде Заркова не оставили на аугменте и царапины.

traits.locale_text: Сотни лет пребывания в агрессивной среде Заркова не оставили на аугменте и царапины.

languages.text: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.
languages.original_text: Сотни лет пребывания в агрессивной среде Заркова не оставили на аугменте и царапины.

traits.locale_text: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have left not a single scratch upon this augmetic.
Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have left not a single scratch upon this augmetic.
Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.
Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.

languages.text: Zarkov'un aşındırıcı ortamına yüzlerce yıl maruz kalmasına rağmen bu ogmentin yüzeyinde tek bir çizik bile bulunmuyor.
languages.original_text: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'un aşındırıcı ortamına yüzlerce yıl maruz kalmasına rağmen bu ogmentin yüzeyinde tek bir çizik bile bulunmuyor.

languages.text: Ni siquiera siglos de exposición al corrosivo entorno de Zarkov han logrado dejar huella en este aumético.
languages.original_text: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.

traits.locale_text: Ni siquiera siglos de exposición al corrosivo entorno de Zarkov han logrado dejar huella en este aumético.

languages.text: Malgré des siècles d'exposition à l'environnement corrosif de Zarkov, cet augmétique est en parfait état.
languages.original_text: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.

traits.locale_text: Malgré des siècles d'exposition à l'environnement corrosif de Zarkov, cet augmétique est en parfait état.

languages.text: 即使暴露于扎尔科夫的腐蚀环境下数个世纪之久，也未在此植入物上留下丝毫痕迹。
languages.original_text: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.

traits.locale_text: 即使暴露于扎尔科夫的腐蚀环境下数个世纪之久，也未在此植入物上留下丝毫痕迹。

languages.text: Mehrere Jahrhunderte in der korrosiven Umgebung von Zarkov haben an dieser Augmentation keinerlei Spuren hinterlassen.
languages.original_text: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.

traits.locale_text: Mehrere Jahrhunderte in der korrosiven Umgebung von Zarkov haben an dieser Augmentation keinerlei Spuren hinterlassen.

languages.text: 数世紀にわたるザルコフの腐食性環境への曝露も、このオーグメティックには一つの痕跡すら残していない。
languages.original_text: Centuries of exposure to Zarkov's corrosive environment have not left a single mark upon this augmetic.

traits.locale_text: 数世紀にわたるザルコフの腐食性環境への曝露も、このオーグメティックには一つの痕跡すら残していない。
